description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular design. The lower level features a wood-textured facade, while the upper level is finished in a smooth, light gray material. Large, floor-to-ceiling windows are present on two sides, providing ample natural light to the interior spaces. The main entrance is centrally located on the front facade, flanked by two mature trees and a concrete walkway leading to the door. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with a mix of vertical and horizontal orientations. The house is surrounded by a small, neatly maintained lawn, suggesting an urban or suburban setting.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, wood and gray exterior, large windows, and a central entryway flanked by trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two large trees, and a walkway leading to the door, with large windows on both floors.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the asymmetrical window placement and the wood-textured lower facade, with one tree visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large floor-to-ceiling windows on both levels and the uninterrupted flat roofline.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the combination of large and narrow windows, the wood and gray exterior, and the side lawn with trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Central flush door with no steps, flanked by trees and a straight walkway, minimalistic and unadorned
